
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>
<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick the blue circular object

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From my current position, I can see several objects in the scene, but I need to verify which one is blue and circular. Let me get a closer look at some of the potential candidates. I notice some objects in the center of the scene that might match this description. I'll move closer to get a better view.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Walk`

```json
{
  "x": 0.91,
  "y": 0.62,
  "z": 0.93
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762991403510, 'end': 1762991410130, 'elapsed': 6620}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 1341.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `Walk` → `{'t0': 10713267, 't1': 10714608, 'elapsed': 1341}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=6374, completion=163, total=6537
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Walk</strong></summary>

**Content**
Target position reached at \(x=1.17, y=0.08, z=1.14\)

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] Now that I'm closer, let me look at the objects to identify the blue circular one.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `Look`

```json
{
  "x": 0.91,
  "y": 0.62,
  "z": 0.93
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762991411475, 'end': 1762991418394, 'elapsed': 6919}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 1472.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `Look` → `{'t0': 10721532, 't1': 10723004, 'elapsed': 1472}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=6570, completion=118, total=6688
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: Look</strong></summary>

**Content**
Look complete. An augmented image will be returned in the next user message labeled \[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]. The \[symbolic perception\]\(\#symbolic\-perception\) has been updated

</details>

<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Images**
<img alt="image" src="data:image/png;base64," />

**Content**
\[VISUAL\_PERCEPTION\]

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From this closer view, I can see object \#37 which appears to be a blue circular object. Based on the symbolic perception, it's at position \(x=0.91, y=0.62, z=0.93\). I will now attempt to pick up this object.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "37"
}
```


<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

- **Generation timing (ms):** `{'start': 1762991419871, 'end': 1762991429166, 'elapsed': 9295}`
- **Tool timings (aggregate, ms):** `{'elapsed_sum': 705.0}`
- **Tool timings (per call, ms):**
  - `PickObject` → `{'t0': 10732305, 't1': 10733010, 'elapsed': 705}`
- **Token usage:** prompt=7860, completion=122, total=7982
</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: PickObject</strong></summary>

**Content**
Successfully picked object 37

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
I have successfully picked up the blue circular object \(tagged as \#37\). The object matches the description you provided and I was able to grasp it without any issues.

<details>
<summary>📊 <strong>Instrumentations</strong></summary>

</details>
